final_prompt.prompt:
Create a domestic financing roadshow PPT cover for the GPT-5.5 launch announcement.

Style/medium: needs a "国内路演" (domestic roadshow) aesthetic with "GP调性" (GP temperament) — references in the spirit of 红杉中国 pitch deck visual culture, 高瓴资本 investment memo design language, 2020s Chinese tech IPO roadshow aesthetics; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be PPT cover format (16:9 slide layout), speaker name placement prominent
Subject: must include the speaker "奥特曼" (Sam Altman) as the featured presenter
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, high-stakes funding announcement atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that signals credibility and tech-forward authority — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "奥特曼" (speaker name), "GPT-5.5" (product name)
Constraints: must conform to Chinese domestic roadshow conventions (融资宣发 PPT format), GP-appropriate tone
Avoid: must avoid overly playful or consumer-grade aesthetics, must avoid Western-centric visual clichés inappropriate for Chinese institutional investors
